title: Pack Npm Executor Schema
description: Run pnpm pack for npm distribution, optionally set version and copy tarballs

packageDir.description: Directory to pack (relative to the project root). Defaults to the project root.

destination.description: Optional destination directory for *.tgz files (relative to the project root).

setVersionFrom.description: Optional path to a package.json (relative to the project root) whose version is applied before packing.
